_comment: Curation source-of-truth for the 'AI Data Center Buildout' sidebar chart, consumed by capex_collector.py. Ordering here is only a hint; the collector re-sorts by value descending. For public:true companies the collector fetches trailing-12-mo capex live from SEC EDGAR (no override needed); add value/estimated/source/basis/as_of to override the live figure (e.g. to show a data-center-only estimate). For public:false companies (private labs with no SEC filings) the value MUST be set here, as an annualized $B figure, with a source URL and as_of date. Keep private figures current as guidance changes.

companies.label: Anthropic
companies.basis: annualized share of announced $50B multi-year US build-out
